  "sql": "SELECT s.cntry_cd, s.state_cd, s.city_nm, SUM(oh.tot_amt) AS total_revenue FROM ord_hdr oh JOIN store_dim s ON oh.store_id = s.store_id WHERE oh.sts_cd <> 'X' GROUP BY s.cntry_cd, s.state_cd, s.city_nm ORDER BY s.cntry_cd, s.state_cd, s.city_nm;",
